amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 3 — paragraph 1 — point 44 m (new)
parliament_text:
(44m) ‘state of the art’ means the developed stage of technical capability at a given time as regards products, processes and services, based on the relevant consolidated findings of science, technology and experience;

‘state of the art’ means the developed stage of technical capability at a given time as regards products, processes and services, based on the relevant consolidated findings of science, technology and experience;
